description_long: This muffin features a domed top generously covered in smooth, pastel pink frosting with subtle swirls and a soft, creamy texture. The frosting sits atop a golden-brown, slightly ridged muffin base that appears moist and fluffy. The muffin's base is wider at the top and tapers gently toward the bottom, giving it a classic, homemade appearance. There are no visible toppings, sprinkles, or decorative elements on the frosting, which is evenly distributed. The wrapper is a simple, dark brown color with no discernible pattern or design. The muffin is shown isolated against a plain white background, with no visible plate or surface beneath it.
description: A golden-brown muffin with a domed swirl of smooth, pastel pink frosting and a plain dark brown wrapper, shown isolated on a white background.
description_view_0: Front view shows the muffin's domed pink frosting and the ridged, dark brown wrapper clearly.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights a slight indentation in the frosting and the rounded shape of the muffin top.
description_view_2: The back view displays the even, rounded frosting and the symmetrical muffin base.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the smooth swirl of the pink frosting and the uniformity of the wrapper.
